downsides.description: Removing infer-from-name (e.g. '15kg' in Acém Novilho, '1kg' in Bacon Burger) means rows with missing or illegible quantity columns will emit null instead of inferred values.
downsides.mitigation: Post-GPT deterministic pack-parser for known patterns when column is null; flag null rows for human review in VL.
downsides.vlImpact: Bidfood and Aviludo have clear quantity columns — low risk. Weight-based fresh meat lines without visible qty column are highest risk.

downsides.risk: Lower row recall on edge layouts
downsides.description: Stricter 'only visible line items' rule may cause GPT to skip rows where product description is partially occluded or merged with lot sub-lines.
downsides.mitigation: Geometry/crop quality already at 100% row recall post-fix. Monitor for missing rows on new suppliers.
downsides.vlImpact: Current VL: 0 missing rows across 6 invoices. Risk is forward-looking, not retroactive.

downsides.description: If phantom row is correctly eliminated, Mammafiore drops from 9→8 extracted rows, improving alignment. No new unmatched real rows expected.
downsides.mitigation: Row-count sanity check vs geometry Pass B.
downsides.vlImpact: Positive — removes 1 phantom causing +€16.82 line-sum inflation.

downsides.description: 'Prefer null over guessing' may increase null prices on low-quality crops where current prompt would guess from arithmetic.
downsides.mitigation: Existing reconcileLineItemAmounts can fill one missing field when two of three are present; do not extend reconcile to invent from description.
downsides.vlImpact: Marginal — VL crops are high quality post geometry-fix.

downsides.description: Column-faithful rule could theoretically under-extract Birra Peroni if model treats *24 as metadata despite column showing 24.
downsides.mitigation: Positive example explicitly shows Aviludo Birra Peroni: column=24 → qty=24. Column always wins when both present.
downsides.vlImpact: Bidfood/Aviludo retail pack lines remain correct — column and description agree.

downsides.description: Removing 'Acém Novilho 15kg → qty 15' pattern hurts invoices where purchased weight IS the qty but column shows weight in description only (common on butcher invoices).
downsides.mitigation: Whitelist weight-as-qty ONLY when unit column shows kg AND no separate qty column exists; or handle in post-processing.
downsides.vlImpact: Not observed in current 6-invoice VL corpus; monitor on future meat suppliers.

downsides.description: 33% of financial errors (Prosciutto, Pellegrino, POMODOR price) are vision limitations prompt alone cannot fix.
downsides.mitigation: Complement prompt with post-GPT arithmetic sanity checks, column-boundary hints from geometry, or re-OCR on price cells.
downsides.vlImpact: Emporio line-sum delta (+€2) and Bocconcino price residual (€10) may remain after prompt deploy.

downsides.description: 8/15 error-catalog rows are description-only OCR noise. Strict description accuracy (84%) will not improve.
downsides.mitigation: Accept MINOR_VARIATION tolerance; optional fuzzy-match in ingredient identity layer.
downsides.vlImpact: Aviludo May strict description accuracy stays at 50%; lenient stays 100%.

regressionScenarios.scenario: Butcher invoice with weight-only qty in description
regressionScenarios.currentBehavior: Infers qty=15 kg from '15kg' in name

regressionScenarios.scenario: Bidfood MO/EM herbs with qty=1 implicit
regressionScenarios.note: Bidfood columns are clear — no VL regression observed

netRiskVerdict: Benefits outweigh risks for VL corpus. Primary residual risk is column-shift vision errors and null qty on weight-in-name edge cases not present in current 6 invoices.
